name: vikunja
title: Vikunja
description: Manage your Vikunja tasks from Raycast — list, create, and quick-add tasks.
author: jkrumm

commands.name: my-tasks
commands.title: My Tasks
commands.description: View and manage open tasks grouped by due date

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.description: Create a new task with full details

commands.name: quick-add
commands.title: Quick Add Task
commands.description: Add a task instantly with minimal input

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Vikunja
commands.description: Show overdue and today tasks in the menu bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Vikunja URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Vikunja instance
